rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DONALD M. WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Petition To And For (1) Direct Transfer Of Property To Conservator (2) Damages For Financial Elder Abuse (3) Conversion (4) Constructive Trust (5) Unjust Enrichment (6) Common Counts And (7) Fraud - Intentional Misrepresentation
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Strike Portions of Petition is denied. Respondents failed to comply with the meet and confer requirement of CCP § 435.5. Additionally, an amended petition was filed on April 13, 2018. Respondents have made no showing that they are prejudiced by the amended petition having been filed one day late, and further, Respondents state in their papers that the amended petition addresses the issues presented in their motion to strike portions of the original petition. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, April 24, 2018.
